title: A Quieter Christmas
prose: A second Christmas at Hogwarts is a different thing from a first — less wide-eyed wonder at the decorated suits of armour and the twelve towering trees in the Great Hall, more a settled, comfortable knowledge of exactly how good the whole thing is going to be.

Whether you stay at the castle or head home for the break, there's a letter or two waiting, a stocking that somehow found you regardless, and the particular, unhurried pleasure of a school with half its usual noise gone quiet.

choices.label: You stayed at Hogwarts for the holidays.
You went home for the break.
